description_long: This is a classic cast iron radiator mounted on a rectangular backplate, with a robust, industrial design. The radiator features six vertical, rounded columns connected by horizontal pipes at the top and bottom, all finished in a glossy black. Two polished metal support pipes extend from the floor to the radiator, anchoring it securely and providing a stable base. The top of the radiator is framed by a horizontal bar, likely for additional support or as a towel rail. The backplate and base are smooth, light gray, and appear to be made of a solid material, possibly stone or concrete. The overall appearance is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban interiors or restored historic buildings.
description: A glossy black, cast iron radiator with six vertical columns, mounted on a smooth gray backplate and base, featuring polished metal support pipes and a horizontal top bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing six vertical radiator columns, polished support pipes, and the full rectangular backplate and base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's depth, the cylindrical shape of the columns, and the protruding support pipes.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the smooth, featureless gray backplate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the radiator's depth and support structure.
attribute_pipe_connections: two, bottom left and bottom right, vertical orientation
